arts.ttl: Napoli & Man Utd Touted for High-Profile Swap Deal
arts.sum: Napoli and Manchester United could arrange a mouth-watering swap deal in January involving Victor Osimhen and Marcus Rashford. According to recent reports in England, Ruben Amorim is keen on the Partenopei loanee after an underwhelming start to Old Trafford life.
